name: Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate invoice reconciliation instead of manual tracking and reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Manual invoice reconciliation is time-consuming and error-prone.
features: Weekly email reports of reconciled invoices

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual invoice reconciliation is time-consuming and error-prone.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate invoice reconciliation instead of manual tracking and reconciliation using spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking and reconciliation using spreadsheets
must_have_features: Weekly email reports of reconciled invoices

one_liner: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate invoice reconciliation instead of manual tracking and reconciliation using spreadsheets.
